howItWorks.title: Frictionless hiring, Zero Risk
howItWorks.subtitle: We combine the speed of Web2 SaaS with the transparency and security of Web3 Smart Contracts.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Talent doesn't upload an empty resume. They pass AI tests and receive an immutable SBT (Soulbound Token) that certifies their real skills.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Our algorithm analyzes the company's tech stack and the talent's SBTs to make the perfect match in less than 48 hours. No human bias.
howItWorks.step3Desc: The company deposits funds in a Smart Contract. Talent works securely. Payment is automatically released upon delivery.

engine.title:
The Ultimate
Recruiting Engine
engine.desc: DAO Talent Hub deploys quantum models and predictive LLMs to audit not only GitHub but also contributions on Hugging Face, Kaggle, arXiv papers, and quantum computing architectures. We build an irrefutable on-chain profile of the top 1% global elite talent, eliminating hiring risk.

tokenomics.title: On-Chain Governance and Rewards
tokenomics.subtitle: Talent retains 100% of their value. Investors fund the engine. Everyone wins with $TAL.
tokenomics.card1Desc: Every successfully completed project adds on-chain experience, increasing your SBT level and unlocking premium clients.
tokenomics.card2Desc: Early adopters, validator nodes, and top 1% talent receive periodic airdrops and voting power over DAO fees.

dataRoomHub.desc: Interactive master file of the DAO Talent Hub ecosystem. Official business documents, audited projections, cap table, and tokenomics natively integrated into the platform.
dataRoomHub.capDesc: Interactive capital distribution structure. Explore SAFEs, Warrants, and token vesting visually.

dataRoomHub.bpStep1Desc: LLM integration + SBT validation on Base Sepolia.
dataRoomHub.bpStep2Desc: Mathematical certification of Core smart contracts.
dataRoomHub.finDesc: Live financial dashboard with key metrics, revenue projections, and the ecosystem's deflationary model.

businessPlan.subtitle: The decentralized protocol that unifies web3 education and B2B talent selection through Artificial Intelligence and On-Chain cryptographic validation.
businessPlan.exec1: DAO Talent Hub is not just a recruitment platform; it is a complete economic ecosystem. We have designed a trustless bridge between emerging global talent and the urgent needs of tech startups in Web3 and Artificial Intelligence.
businessPlan.exec2: Through the $TAL token, we align the incentives of three main actors: students (Learn-to-Earn), instructors (Teach-to-Earn), and companies (Hire-to-Earn via staking). This allows scaling user acquisition at zero marginal cost, while generating B2B revenue via automated Escrow contracts.
businessPlan.prob1: • Resume falsification in the tech sector.
businessPlan.prob3: • High turnover and lack of culture-fit.
businessPlan.sol1: • SBT (Soulbound Tokens) credentials impossible to forge.
businessPlan.sol2: • Smart Match AI Engine: Instant data-driven matching.
businessPlan.sol3: • Code audits as Proof of Work (PoW).
businessPlan.marketDesc: The global IT recruitment market is projected to reach $142 billion by 2028. However, our wedge is the Web3 and AI development niche, a subsegment with a 32% annual compound growth rate (CAGR).
businessPlan.arch1: The platform is built on Base (Coinbase L2) to guarantee near-zero fees and seamless integration with the EVM ecosystem. Critical smart contracts (Escrow, SBT Emission, and Treasury Staking) are mathematically audited.
businessPlan.arch2: The Match Engine (Smart Match AI) uses RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) on talent's GitHub repositories and SBT histories to find the perfect fit with the company's Job Description.
businessPlan.rm1Desc: Onboarding 50 Web3 startups. Smart Match V2 deployment and first Escrow contract validations on Base Sepolia.
businessPlan.rm2Desc: Public launch of $TAL token. Transition of treasury to DAO control via Snapshot.
businessPlan.rm3Desc: Opening the university hub to quantum computing courses. Reputation system extended to decentralized oracles.

capTable.title: Cap Table & Tokenomics

capTable.t1Desc: Release by protocol milestones (TVL and Escrow Contracts).
capTable.t2Desc: Initial developers and strategic advisory board.
capTable.t3Desc: Seed investors (SAFE Round and Shielded Warrants).

financials.title: Projections & Modeling
financials.desc: Key metrics, operating budget, and gross merchandise value (GMV) projections for the ecosystem's first 24 months.
financials.chartSub: Based on B2B Escrow adoption + SaaS Subscriptions
financials.defDesc: 20% of the fiat revenue generated by B2B Escrow fees and premium subscriptions will be allocated quarterly to buy back `$TAL` tokens on the open market to be provably burned.
financials.stakeDesc: Companies hiring talent must stake `$TAL` tokens proportional to the contract size. This mechanism continuously locks liquidity while generating cryptographic trust between parties.
